---
title: " "
output:
  html_document:
    theme: flatly
    toc: false
    df_print: paged
    css: styles.css
---

<div class="page-title">Curriculum Vitae</div>

<div class="cv-actions">
<a class="cv-download" href="Lonnie_Ernst_Resume.pdf" download>Download one-page resume (PDF)</a>
</div>

## Professional Summary

Biotechnology professional with a B.S. in Biotechnology and four-plus years of combined industry and academic laboratory experience across molecular biology, nucleic acid extraction and quantification, PCR, and microbiology. Experienced in executing high-complexity procedures under SOPs, maintaining rigorous quality-control documentation, troubleshooting assays, and training laboratory personnel. Comfortable working both independently and collaboratively in fast-paced, quality-controlled environments, with a growing focus on applying data analysis and computational tools to laboratory work.

<div class="chevron-divider"><span></span><span></span><span></span></div>

## Professional Experience

### Specialist III, Media Production Coordinator
<div class="cv-meta">Salt Lake Community College — InnovaBio · Sep 2021 – Present</div>

- Perform high-complexity molecular biology procedures including PCR and nucleic acid extraction and quantification.
- Participate in the development, optimization, and validation of new assays and protocols; write and maintain SOPs and troubleshoot assays.
- Train laboratory personnel in molecular techniques, contamination control, equipment operation, and data recording.
- Lead media production for biology departments and manage inventory, supplies, and equipment.

### Formulator II
<div class="cv-meta">bioMérieux · May 2023 – Present</div>

- Perform aseptic formulation of buffers and reagents for molecular diagnostic platforms in a fast-paced, quality-controlled GMP manufacturing environment.
- Train laboratory personnel in GMP documentation, reagent preparation, and contamination-control standards in compliance with company SOPs.
- Apply a continuous-improvement mindset to workflow optimization.

### Microbiologist
<div class="cv-meta">Analytical Research Labs · May 2022 – May 2023</div>

- Performed aseptic sample preparation, microbial culture and enumeration, and quality-control testing for nutraceutical and dietary supplement manufacturers in a high-throughput environment.
- Tracked and documented samples using LIMS software; led team in meeting testing deadlines under time pressure.

<div class="chevron-divider"><span></span><span></span><span></span></div>

## Education

### Bachelor of Science, Biotechnology
<div class="cv-meta">Utah Valley University · 2026</div>

Relevant coursework: Molecular Biology, Genetics, Genomics, Cell Biology, Microbiology, Organic Chemistry, Biochemistry I.

<div class="chevron-divider"><span></span><span></span><span></span></div>

## Technical Skills

**Molecular Biology & Microbiology:** PCR, Nucleic Acid Extraction & Quantification, Gel Electrophoresis, Plasmid Design, Serial Dilution, Aseptic & Sterile Technique, Microbial Culture & Enumeration, BSL-2 Operations, Contamination Control

**Genomics & Diagnostics:** NGS Principles, DNA Extraction from Biological Samples, Genotyping Concepts, Sequence Analysis

**Data & Quality:** SOP Writing & Execution, Assay Development, Quality Control, LIMS, Data Review, GMP Compliance

**Computing:** Data Analysis & Visualization (R), Command Line / Bash, Electronic Lab Notebook, MS Word, MS Excel, MS PowerPoint, Google Workspace

<div class="chevron-divider"><span></span><span></span><span></span></div>

## Research

For a detailed overview of current and past research projects, see the [Research page](research.html).
